ROAST

SPEAKERS &
JUDGES

11 Confirmed
Tori Pastore
Founder · Soup
Experiential social lab creating outsized scenes and leveraging memetics to grab attention.
Dan Rodman
CEO · Co/Unity
Former pro soccer player & engineer, pioneering community systems for EigenLayer, Gnosis & more.
Valeria Salazar
CMO · Wonderland
Marketing & comms expert in Web3. Former Etherealize and Optimism. Shapes narratives for emerging tech.
Zayi Reyes
Head of Customer Mktg · Chainlink Labs
8+ years in blockchain connecting Chainlink's product, community, and brand to accelerate growth.
Nick Fouriezos
Founder & CMO · Scalable Storytelling
Former DC correspondent. Led marketing for crypto startups with $200M+ in raises.
Mashal Waqar
CMO · Octant / Golem Fdn
Co-authored State of Web3 Grants 2023–24. Forbes Middle East 30 Under 30. 2× TEDx speaker.
Amar Ravi
Product Mktg Lead · Meta Platforms
Leads product marketing for ads on WhatsApp. 8+ years at Meta across enterprise and SMB.
Gloria Kimbwala
Lead Event Strategist · Optimism / OP Labs
Global ecosystem architect. Top 10 Women in Fintech. Technical Advisor to Black Women Blockchain Council.
Matt Bond
Innovation · Myosin
Award-winning creative strategist. Innovation at Myosin.
Jake Salerno
VP of GTM · 0G Labs
Led GTM securing 350+ integrations. Former Chainlink Labs — contributed to $1T+ in Total Value Secured.
Rachael Sacks
Head of Marketing · Stratosphere
Former Founding CMO at Cue Market. Former Hype and Magna.
